subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of Abdu'l-Baha! Thou art verily steadfast and firm in constancy and service. I beseech God that thou mayest ever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء فی الحقیقه موفق بثبوت و استقامتی و قائم بخدمت از خدا خواهم که همواره
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
